title: The Band Wagon
writer: Betty Comden, Adolph Green, Norman Corwin
actors: Fred Astaire, Cyd Charisse, Oscar Levant
plot: An aging movie star uncertain of his future teams up with a top ballerina to headline a new Broadway musical, but the pretentiously artistic goals of its director threaten to change it beyond recognition.
awards: Nominated for 3 Oscars. 2 wins & 4 nominations total
